cases.testName: FIN-AUTHZ-PERM-001 rejects stale client permission claims before finance mutation
FIN-AUTHZ-COOKIE-PERM-001 executes cookie-authenticated finance boundaries and denies revoked permissions
FIN-AUTHZ-PARTIAL-DOWNGRADE-001 rejects stale elevated cancellation claims while retaining base permissions
FIN-AUTHZ-SCOPE-001 denies adjacent location, department, and project finance writes without money, workflow, or audit effects
FIN-AUTHZ-RECORD-001 executes every finance lifecycle boundary with a foreign record id and no mutation
FIN-AUTHZ-SOD-001 blocks self-approval across budget, expense, cash advance, and petty cash domains
FIN-AUTHZ-STATE-001 rejects invalid finance lifecycle and accounting-period states without side effects
FIN-AUTHZ-COMPANY-001 rejects an adjacent-company accounting period before close workflow mutation
FIN-AUTHZ-EVIDENCE-BOUNDARY-001 executes finance evidence boundaries with live denial and denial-only audit effects
denies same-company evidence source records outside the active location scope
executes every controlled-evidence source adapter against the migrated schema
FIN-AUTHZ-EXPORT-AUDIT-001 binds export audit mutation to a guarded finance export caller
FIN-AUTHZ-TOCTOU-001 serializes budget and journal creation against concurrent authority revocation
coveredControls: transactional location and project scope revalidation
no budget, journal, workflow, or audit mutation

noMutationControls: no budget or finance dashboard disclosure after live permission revocation
no cash-advance dashboard disclosure after live permission revocation
no expense-request dashboard disclosure after live permission revocation
no finance foundation disclosure after live permission revocation
